Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: From interviews: - Mary (AP Clerk): Invoice arrives by email Check if associated with valid PO number If no PO send back to supplier requesting more details If has PO log into accounting system After logging forward to purchasing department to confirm goods received Once confirmation match invoice line items against PO If everything matches send to department manager for approval If discrepancy email purchasing team to clarify Sometimes if discrepancy cant be resolved easily escalate to supervisor Once all issues resolved and manager approves schedule it for payment - Dan (Purchasing Officer): Receives invoice from AP Checks if details line up with PO compares quantities prices delivery charges If off contact supplier directly or ask AP clerk to hold until corrected If correct send confirmation email back to AP If PO number missing tell Mary to get that info - Carlos (Department Manager): Gets notification after matched to PO and Dan confirms Reviews and approves or rejects holds for investigation - Rita (AP Supervisor): Escalation when cant match or issues Contacts suppliers coordinates For no PO informal services create retrospective PO or reject After clearing goes back to normal flow - Karen (Supplier Relationship Manager): Helps resolve if doesnt match terms missing PO pricing discrepancy checks contract

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to model the process Invoice arrives Validate PO presence If no PO return to supplier for missing details But Mary says if no PO sends back Dan mentions if PO number missing tells Mary to get info So possibly initial check does invoice have PO If not AP clerk requests missing PO from supplier and waits for revised invoice Then again check So theres a loop Also Karen says if missing PO asks supplier to provide it or send revised So that might be a path If has PO AP clerk logs into accounting system Then forward to purchasing for confirmation of receipt Dan says he receives from AP Purchasing then checks receipt of goods services and compares invoice to PO

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Dan confirms line items quantities prices delivery charges If discrepancies off they may contact supplier directly or ask AP to hold If discrepancy cant be resolved escalate to supervisor Rita So after mismatch detection resolve with supplier maybe via Karen or escalate Dan says if somethings off contact supplier or ask AP clerk to hold multiple resolution paths Once corrected or confirmed purchasing sends confirmation email back to AP Then AP matches invoice line items against PO in system Mary says after confirmation she matches But Dans confirmation might already involve matching Possibly purchasing confirmation about receipt AND comparison Well model as after receiving invoice from AP Purchasing verifies PO and receipt If discrepancies found during verification they either resolve directly request AP to hold If resolved send confirmation to AP Then AP performs matching system after receiving confirmation If discrepancies in matching AP emails purchasing So there could be a loop

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Then after matching all correct AP sends to manager for approval Manager Carlos gets notification reviews either approves or rejects holds for investigation If reject hold APC investigates After approval AP schedules for payment Exception handling For invoices without PO informal services Rita works with dept heads to create retrospective PO or reject Also Karen loops in for supplier issues

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need to consolidate conflicting accounts Mary says after matching sends to manager Dan assumes after his confirmation it goes to manager Carlos says after matching and Dan confirmation he gets notification This aligns No conflict

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Roles Accounts Payable Clerk Mary Purchasing Officer Dan Department Manager Carlos Accounts Payable Supervisor Rita Supplier Relationship Manager Karen Systems Accounting system Suppliers external Artifacts Invoice Purchase Order PO confirmation system notifications Sequence Start event Invoice received by email Then task Check for valid PO number APC Gateway Is PO present No Task Request missing PO from supplier APC loop back Yes Log invoice into accounting system APC Forward invoice to Purchasing APC Purchasing Verify invoice against PO and receipt Purchasing Officer Gateway Discrepancy found Yes Resolve discrepancy collaborative loop or escalate to Supervisor Rita back to verification No Send confirmation to APC APC Match invoice line items to PO APC Gateway Match successful No loop to resolution Yes Send to manager Manager Review and approve Gateway Approved Yes Schedule for payment No Investigate loop

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Well structure textual BPMN like description Process name Invoice Approval Process Participants APC PO DM APS SRM Supplier Artifacts Invoice PO System notification Confirmation email Then steps 1 Start 2 Check PO 3 Log 4 Forward 5 Verify 6 Confirmation 7 Match 8 Send approval 9 Review 10 Schedule 11 End Incorporate Karen ad hoc during resolution Note exceptions captured in escalation Plan output as structured list with performers conditions Use lanes for roles
